creator: wfdudley@gmail.com
text:
The package p5-Email-Sender depends on p5-Email-Address, which is deprecated.
I understand that p5-Email-Address-XS can be used as a replacement for
p5-Email-Address.

p5-Email-Address-1.909: Tag: expiration_date Value: 2018-12-31
p5-Email-Address-1.909: Tag: deprecated Value: Deprecated by upstream
